name: Social Media Ingestion
description: Fetch and store social media transcripts from TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and hosted media URLs into dedicated Open Brain tables with semantic search.

services: TokScript account for Instagram/Reels and fallback extraction
ElevenLabs Speech to Text API key for TikTok/YouTube video transcription
OpenRouter API key for embeddings and TikTok photo carousel vision OCR
